creator: dpejesh@yahoo.com
text: It should be fine to make it to @dir(root,haclient,1770).  The one drawback of that though is corosync can be configured to allow non-privileged users to communicate with it by checking getpeereid().  With the socket directory set to 1770 that means those users will also have to be part of the haclient group in order to create the client sockets in /var/run/qb.
